title: LazyBot — Daily Accountability Companion
stack: Python · FastAPI · LLM APIs · Prompt Engineering
points: Built an AI accountability assistant that helps users stay consistent with their daily goals.
Generates personalized reminders and motivational messages based on user progress.
Uses prompt engineering to produce meaningful, low-noise conversations instead of generic notifications.
Designed with a modular architecture to support future integrations such as calendars, task managers and voice assistants.
Focused on improving productivity, habit formation and long-term consistency through conversational AI.
